title: Cloud Spend
description: Structured output produced by the budget_check skill. Records actual vs. approved monthly cloud spend for a project.

project_key.description: Unique project identifier. Must match the key in state.json.

status.description: Budget status derived by comparing monthly_actual against monthly_approved.

checked_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when the spend data was retrieved.

monthly_actual.description: Actual cloud spend for the current month-to-date, in USD. Null if NO_DATA.

monthly_approved.description: Approved monthly budget threshold for this project, in USD. Null if NO_DATA.

variance_pct.description: Signed percentage variance: ((actual - approved) / approved) * 100. Negative means under budget. Null if NO_DATA.

currency_note.description: Optional. If source data was converted from another currency, document the exchange rate and date used here.

data_source.description: Optional. Identifies the billing integration used (e.g., 'aws_cost_explorer', 'azure_cost_management').
